global_description: A small, plump songbird with a rounded body and a short tail. It has a predominantly olive-brown upper body and a pale, buffy underbelly. The bird features a distinctive rusty cap and a long, slightly curved bill. Its wings and tail are darker brown, providing a subtle contrast to its lighter body.

part_details.head: Rounded with a rusty cap, pale eye stripe, and olive-brown cheeks.
part_details.bill: Long, slender, slightly curved, dark at the tip.
part_details.body: Plump, with olive-brown upperparts and pale buffy underparts.

spatial_relations: The rusty cap covers the top of the head.
The long bill extends from the front of the face.
The dark wings are positioned on either side of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
